description: Shelf overview v2 — insight-first dashboard for the rc.5 drain wave (PRs #40,#43,#46,#49,#50,#54,#67,#68,#69 + SHELF-21e/-23/-29 backfill). 20 actionable panels in 5 rows: traffic-light health, per-pool + cost, culprit tables, drain-wave feature observability, and A/B tag attribution (SHELF-42). Every panel passes the 'am I doing good or bad, what action do I take?' test. Migration note: this dashboard is intended to replace shelf-overview (uid=shelf-overview, 48 panels) once validated; until then both can coexist.

panels.title: Row 1 — Traffic light: am I doing good or bad?
Hit ratio (5m)
panels.description: Share of cache lookups served from local DRAM/NVMe instead of S3. Action: hit ratio < 40% in steady state ⇒ either cache is cold (recent restart, working-set churn) or NVMe is too small — open the runbook.

targets.expr: sum(rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_hits_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", pool=~"$pool"})[5m:30s])) / clamp_min(sum(rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_hits_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", pool=~"$pool"})[5m:30s])) + sum(rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_misses_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", pool=~"$pool"})[5m:30s])), 1)

panels.title: $/hr saved
panels.description: Audit-able dollars saved per hour from cache hits (SHELF-40). ANTI-OVERCLAIM: the underlying counter refuses to publish unless cluster spec sets cost.amortizedDollarsPerHour. If this stat reads exactly $0/hr while hit ratio is healthy, the amortization input is missing — set it before claiming any savings figure. Source: shelf_s3_dollars_saved_rate_cents_per_sec * 36 (cents/sec × 3600 ÷ 100). Counter unit is integer cents.

targets.expr: sum(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_s3_dollars_saved_rate_cents_per_sec{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod"})) * 36

panels.title: RSS max pod
panels.description: Worst-pod resident memory. Hard ceiling on the alluxio NodePool is ~27.3 GiB allocatable per node; sustained > 26 GiB has historically preceded OOMKill. Action: > 22 GiB ⇒ watch LODC drops and rewarm queue depth; > 26 GiB ⇒ tune cache.pools.rowgroup.dramSizeBytes down or scale shelfd.

targets.expr: max(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"shelf-.*", pod=~"$pod", container="shelfd"}))

panels.title: shelfd restarts (24h)
panels.description: Container restart count over the last 24h, summed across all in-scope shelf pods. In a healthy cluster this is exactly 0. Most restarts are OOMKill — cross-check with kube events and the LODC-drops panel before drawing conclusions.

targets.expr: sum(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (increase(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"shelf-.*", pod=~"$pod", container="shelfd"}[24h])))

panels.title: LODC drops/min
panels.description: Hybrid-pool admissions dropped by SHELF-21e level gate (submit_queue_overflow) + SHELF-29 token-bucket (rate_limit). Sustained non-zero ⇒ NVMe drain falling behind ingress; the cache is doing less work than it could. Threshold: green 0 / amber 1-100 / red > 100. Drill into row 3 to see which reason.

targets.expr: 60 * sum(rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_lodc_drops_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", pool=~"$pool"})[5m:30s]))

panels.title: shelfd errors/min
panels.description: Typed shelfd errors per minute, summed across components (origin, store, control, peer, …). Healthy = 0. Sustained > 10/min ⇒ open row 3 'errors by component' to see where it lives. NOTE: peer-fetch and conditional-GET errors here are non-fatal (fail-open to origin); they still warrant investigation if the rate is sustained.

targets.expr: 60 * sum(rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelfd_error_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod"})[5m:30s]))

panels.title: Per-pool hit ratio (5m) — target 70%
panels.description: Rolling hit ratio split by pool (metadata, rowgroup, text_index). The 70% target line is the v0.5 gate floor; the 40% red line is the auto-rollback signal for a fresh cutover. metadata pool should warm to ~100% within minutes; rowgroup pool to ~70% within 12h.

targets.expr: sum by (pool) (rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_hits_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", pool=~"$pool"})[5m:30s])) / clamp_min(sum by (pool) (rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_hits_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", pool=~"$pool"})[5m:30s])) + sum by (pool) (rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_misses_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", pool=~"$pool"})[5m:30s])), 0.001)

panels.title: $ saved cumulative — SHELF-40 dollars-saved counter
panels.description: Cumulative dollars saved (cents ÷ 100) since each pod's boot, summed across in-scope pods. ANTI-OVERCLAIM: stays at $0 until the operator sets the amortization input. A growing line that resets to 0 = pod restart, not lost savings. Pair with the row-1 $/hr stat for current rate.

targets.expr: sum by (outcome) (max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_s3_dollars_saved_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod"})) / 100

panels.title: Peer-fetch + ETag-conditional outcomes (SHELF-23)
panels.description: How often shelfd avoids an origin round-trip via cross-pod sharing or freshness-window skips. peer_hit = local miss served by a peer pod; conditional_skipped = freshness window let us skip the conditional GET entirely; conditional_not_modified = 304 round-trip, body served from cache; modified = origin had new ETag, cache invalidated. Healthy = peer_hit + conditional_skipped dominate; modified should be a thin baseline (writers writing).

targets.expr: sum(rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_peer_hit_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", pool=~"$pool"})[5m:30s]))
sum(rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_peer_miss_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", pool=~"$pool"})[5m:30s]))
sum(rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_peer_timeout_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", pool=~"$pool"})[5m:30s]))
sum(rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_peer_error_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", pool=~"$pool"})[5m:30s]))
sum(rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_conditional_skipped_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", pool=~"$pool"})[5m:30s]))
sum(rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_conditional_not_modified_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", pool=~"$pool"})[5m:30s]))
sum(rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_conditional_modified_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", pool=~"$pool"})[5m:30s]))

panels.title: Top 20 cold tables by miss rate (15m)
panels.description: Per-Iceberg-table miss rate. The actionable list of pin-list / MV / dbt-materialisation candidates. Healthy clusters have a flat tail near 0; spikes pinpoint the dashboard or pipeline currently paying full S3 latency. Sentinel `other` covers non-Iceberg keys.

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (table) (rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_misses_by_table_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", pool=~"$pool", table=~"$table"})[15m:1m])))

panels.title: LODC drops by reason (rowgroup) — threshold band
panels.description: Drops split by SHELF-21e (submit_queue_overflow) vs SHELF-29 (rate_limit). submit_queue_overflow ⇒ raise pools.rowgroup.diskCache.flushers / submitQueue. rate_limit ⇒ raise admission.maxBytesPerSec or maxBurstBytes. Threshold band: green 0, amber 0-100/min, red > 100/min.

targets.expr: sum by (reason) (rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_lodc_drops_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", pool=~"$pool", reason=~"$reason"})[5m:30s]))

panels.title: Read-path savings — coalesce + bloom + decoded-meta + page-index
panels.description: Drain-wave read-path optimisations. coalesce_follower_ratio = SHELF-30 dedup of concurrent overlapping GETs (target ≥ 0.20 under bursty workloads). bloom_active_ratio = SHELF-46 share of admissions classified as footer/bloom_block (vs not_applicable). decoded_meta_hit_ratio = SHELF-50 in-process LRU hits over (hits+misses). predicate_prune_hit_ratio = SHELF-34 page-index sidecar warm-cache rate. Each line answers 'is the feature actually engaged?' — flat zero ⇒ feature not wired or not exercised.

targets.expr: sum(rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_coalesce_followers_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", pool=~"$pool"})[5m:30s])) / clamp_min(sum(rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_coalesce_leaders_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", pool=~"$pool"})[5m:30s])), 1)

sum(rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_bloom_admit_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", kind=~"footer|bloom_block"})[5m:30s])) / clamp_min(sum(rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_bloom_admit_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod"})[5m:30s])), 1)

sum(rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_decoded_meta_hits_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod"})[5m:30s])) / clamp_min(sum(rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_decoded_meta_hits_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod"})[5m:30s])) + sum(rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_decoded_meta_misses_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod"})[5m:30s])), 0.001)

sum(rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_predicate_prune_requests_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", outcome="hit"})[5m:30s])) / clamp_min(sum(rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_predicate_prune_requests_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod"})[5m:30s])), 0.001)

panels.title: Capacity & admission — compression + W-TinyLFU + A/B tag
panels.description: compression_ratio = 1 − bytes_out / bytes_in (B1 zstd, opt-in via cache.pools.rowgroup.compression.enabled). Healthy when enabled: 0.40-0.70 for Parquet rowgroups. wtinylfu_admit_ratio = SHELF-33 fraction of admit decisions that pass the frequency gate; very high (>0.95) ⇒ working set fits and gate is soft, very low (<0.20) ⇒ scan-heavy workload, gate is filtering aggressively. ab_tag_cap_violations/min = SHELF-42 distinct tag wire-forms folded into 'other' per minute; > 0 ⇒ raise cache.abTag.maxDistinctTags or scrub noisy tag emitters.

targets.expr: 1 - clamp_max(sum(rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_compress_bytes_out_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", pool=~"$pool"})[5m:30s])) / clamp_min(sum(rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_compress_bytes_in_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", pool=~"$pool"})[5m:30s])), 1), 1)

sum(rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_wtinylfu_decisions_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", outcome="admit"})[5m:30s])) / clamp_min(sum(rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_wtinylfu_decisions_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod"})[5m:30s])), 1)
60 * sum(rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_ab_tag_cap_violations_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod"})[5m:30s]))

panels.title: Compaction-aware rewarm reactor (SHELF-45)
panels.description: Per-pod re-warm reactor health. p95(rewarm_lag) = seconds from snapshot commit to last-file warmed; SLO is 1800s (30 min). Healthy in steady state: queue depth flat near 0, inflight_files ≤ max_concurrent_files (default 4), errors/s flat near 0. queue_depth climbing toward queue_capacity = listener producing events faster than reactor's fetch budget — raise max_concurrent_files or accept higher lag.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_rewarm_lag_seconds_bucket{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod"})[15m:1m])))
sum(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_rewarm_inflight_files{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", pool=~"$pool"}))
sum(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_rewarm_queue_depth{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", pool=~"$pool"}))
sum by (reason) (rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_rewarm_errors_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod"})[5m:30s]))

panels.title: shelfd error rate by component
panels.description: Per-component shelfd_error_total rate. component values: origin, store, control, peer, freshness, telemetry, http, lodc, … Healthy: flat zero. Sustained > 1/s on any component is the fingerprint that maps to the corresponding error::Error variant — pull pod logs and pin the failing path.

targets.expr: sum by (component) (rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelfd_error_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod"})[5m:30s]))

panels.title: Top tags by query volume (5m, top 5)
panels.description: Top 5 A/B tags by lookups/sec (hits + misses). Use this to identify which cohorts dominate the workload before reading the per-tag hit ratio. SHELF-42 emits a `tag` label on shelf_hits_by_tag_total / shelf_misses_by_tag_total when the plugin sets X-Shelf-Tag (default-off; enable cache.abTag.enabled). Empty stat = SHELF-42 not enabled or no tagged traffic in window.

targets.expr: topk(5, sum by (tag) (rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_hits_by_tag_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", tag=~"$ab_tag"})[5m:30s])) + sum by (tag) (rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_misses_by_tag_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", tag=~"$ab_tag"})[5m:30s])))

panels.title: Hit ratio by tag (5m, top 5 by volume)
panels.description: Per-tag hit ratio over a 5m window, restricted to the 5 highest-volume tags. Use this to spot cohorts that are dragging the global hit ratio down (cold tag, scan-heavy cohort) vs cohorts that are warm. Reading: a tag flat near 0 = cohort always misses (working set never fits or never recurs); a tag flat near 1 = cohort fully cached. Diverging tags = workload mix is heterogeneous and a global hit-ratio number alone is misleading — use this row instead.

targets.expr: topk(5, sum by (tag) (rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_hits_by_tag_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", tag=~"$ab_tag"})[5m:30s])) / clamp_min(sum by (tag) (rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_hits_by_tag_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", tag=~"$ab_tag"})[5m:30s])) + sum by (tag) (rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_misses_by_tag_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", tag=~"$ab_tag"})[5m:30s])), 0.001))

panels.title: Top tags by miss rate (5m, top 5)
panels.description: Top 5 tags by miss rate (ops/sec) — these are the cohorts hitting origin (S3) the hardest. Action: a single tag dominating miss rate is the candidate for either explicit pin (tools/gen_pin_list.py) or a workload-level review (is this dbt model emitting one query per partition?). Note: shelf_origin_request_seconds has no `tag` label, so per-tag p99 origin latency is not available — use this miss-rate proxy + the global Origin-bytes panel together.

targets.expr: topk(5, sum by (tag) (rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_misses_by_tag_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", tag=~"$ab_tag"})[5m:30s])))

panels.title: A/B tag breakdown — full table
panels.description: Full per-tag breakdown: query volume (lookups/sec), hit ratio, and miss rate. Sortable. Filter via the $ab_tag template variable to focus on a subset. Empty rows past the cardinality cap are folded into the `other` sentinel by the shelfd-side abTag handler (cap defaults to 16 — see panel 20).

targets.expr: sum by (tag) (rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_hits_by_tag_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", tag=~"$ab_tag"})[5m:30s])) + sum by (tag) (rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_misses_by_tag_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", tag=~"$ab_tag"})[5m:30s]))

sum by (tag) (rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_hits_by_tag_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", tag=~"$ab_tag"})[5m:30s])) / clamp_min(sum by (tag) (rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_hits_by_tag_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", tag=~"$ab_tag"})[5m:30s])) + sum by (tag) (rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_misses_by_tag_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", tag=~"$ab_tag"})[5m:30s])), 0.001)
sum by (tag) (rate(max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_misses_by_tag_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod", tag=~"$ab_tag"})[5m:30s]))

panels.title: ab_tag cardinality (cap watch)
panels.description: Distinct ab_tag values currently emitting metrics. Workspace cardinality cap = 16; over-cap tags are folded into the `other` sentinel by shelfd. green ≤ 16, red > 16 = the chart-side cap drifted from the shelfd-side cap (cache.abTag.maxDistinctTags). Cross-reference with shelf_ab_tag_cap_violations_total in row 4 to see the rate at which tags are being capped.

targets.expr: count(count by (tag) (max without(prometheus, dataPrometheusReplica) (shelf_hits_by_tag_total{namespace="alluxio", pod=~"$pod"})))

title: Shelf — Overview v2 (rc.5 drain wave)
